title: We just launched on Product Hunt!
body:
Hey everyone — big news: **Discussion Kit** is officially live on Product Hunt today!

If you're not familiar, Discussion Kit is a SvelteKit-powered forum template that uses **GitHub Discussions** as the backend — no server, no database, no auth system to maintain. Just point it at your repo's Discussions tab and you've got a fast, static forum site deployable straight to GitHub Pages, with GitHub handling replies, reactions, and moderation for you.

This forum you're posting in right now is literally running on it 👀

If you've found it useful (or even just mildly interesting), an upvote would mean a lot: 👉 [producthunt.com/products/git-forum](https://www.producthunt.com/products/git-forum)

Would love to hear feedback, feature requests, or just general roasting in the replies.
